revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) The rep utterance at 00:26 ('There's one time that Sam Levy') must be surfaced in cherry_pick_moments and addressed in rep_intent — it is the only non-voicemail rep-attributed line in the transcript and its omission leaves the call-type diagnosis incomplete. (2) The claim in trajectory_verdict.outcome_dispute that 'the v1 outcome tag is listed as unknown' must be removed or qualified — no v1 tag value is present in the source materials and Stage 3 should not assert a specific tag value it cannot verify. (3) The codex_reference in cherry_pick_moments[0] should be set to null — citing intros.tesla / intros.standard against a voicemail greeting is internally contradictory given Stage 3's own finding that no intro evaluation is applicable. Optional improvement: surface 00:46 ('I think it might') alongside 00:43 as a two-part customer utterance, and separate the ops flag in coaching_focus from the rep coaching priority slot to avoid manager misreading.
